DNMM Information

Aerodrome Data

ICAO DNMM
IATA LOS
Elevation 138 ft
Transition Altitude 3500 ft

Coordinate 14°40′16″N 17°4′1″W

Runways

Runway Heading TORA (m) TODA (m) ASDA (m) LDA (m) Remarks

18L 181º 2745 2745 2788 2745 -
36L 001º 3900 3900 4020 3900 -
18R 181º 3900 3900 4020 3900 -
  • DNMM is not certified for simultaneous or parallel approaches/landings.

Aprons

Apron Type Code Stands Entry / Exit Remarks
International 1 - D31-E66 F1-F2-F3-F4 -
International 2 - C11-C24A F5 -
Domestic 1 - 1-6 C2 -

Cargo - - A -
Business / FBO - - B4 -

Presidential / VIP - - C -
Military - - C -

DNMM Delivery

IFR Clearance Rules

* We have not implemented any specific IFR Clearance or Flight Plan Validation rules at this point.

Cruise Level Rules

  • Nigerian Airspace operates with the following RVSM standard table of Cruising Levels.
  • VFR flights are not allowed over and above the flight level 150 (DOC 7030 ICAO).
Magnetic Track 000º to 179º 180º to 359º
Flight Rules IFR VFR IFR VFR
Flight Level 010 - 020 -
030 035 040 045
050 055 060 065
070 075 080 085
090 095 100 105
110 115 120 125
130 135 140 145
150 155 160 165
170 175 180 185
190 195 200 205
210 215 220 225
230 235 240 245
250 255 260 265
270 275 280 285
290 - 300 -
310 - 320 -
330 - 340 -
350 - 360 -
370 - 380 -
390 - 400 -
410 - 430 -
450 - 470 -
490 - 510 -
530 - 550 -
570 - 590 -
etc - etc -

RWY Fix Departure Type Initial Climb Remarks
18R BUDSI BUDS1Q RNAV Departure FL070 -
IBA IBA1Q FL070 -
ILKEL ILKE1Q FL070 -
UMUNA UMUN1Q FL070 -
BOTBO BOTB1Q FL070 -
PISBA PISB1Q FL070 -
POLTO POLT1Q FL070 -
18L BUDSI BUDS1S FL070 -
IBA IBA1S FL070 -
UMUNA UMUN1S FL120 -
UMUNA UMUN2S FL070 -

DNMM Ground

Push-back Procedures

Phraseology

CALLSIGN, pushback approved, facing DIRECTION.

Directions

Apron Type Facing Remarks
International 1 All North -
International 2 All East -
Domestic 1 All West
Domestic 2 All A1-A6, B5-B8 North/ South, B1-B4 West -
Cargo All North/ South -

Taxi Out Procedures

  • When runway 01 is active, departing traffic shall be instructed to taxi to the runway via C and hold short H, allowing Tower Controllers to issue further instructions to taxi to C6 or C7 based on preferential departure separation.
  • When runway 19 is active, departing traffic shall be instructed to taxi to the runway via C and contact Tower after passing A1, allowing Tower Controllers to issue further instructions to taxi to C1 or C2 based on preferential departure separation.

Phraseology

CALLSIGN,taxi to holding point NUMBER runway NUMBER via ROUTE, time TIME, hold short of runway NUMBER.

Taxi In Procedures

  • In low traffic situations, Tower Controllers are expected to hand over arrival traffic to Ground Controllers once the traffic has vacated the runway.
  • In high traffic situations, in order to maintain the high speed exits clear of traffic, Tower Controllers may issue an initial taxi instruction to arrival traffic before handover to Ground Controllers.
  • If runway 19 is active and traffic is vacating C5, the following instruction may be issued by the Tower Controller.
  • The exception with this rule is traffic landing on runway 19 and wishing to vacate at the end to Apron V. In this situation, Tower Controllers will maintain control of the aircraft.

Phraseology

CALLSIGN,taxi to stand NUMBER via ROUTE.

DNMM Murtala Muhammed Intl | v0.1 | DNKK Kano FIR

>> Go to this page.
>> Go to this page.

DNMM Tower

  • Lorem ipsum verbis est

Runway Selection

  • The preferred runways at DNMM are 18L and 18R as there are no Instrument Approaches for the 36s.
  • Runway 18R is the longer runway and the preferred arrival and departure runway for Heavy aircraft.
  • It is also the preferred arrival and departure runway for traffic headed to the Cargo and International Aprons.
  • Runway 18L is the preferred arrival and departure runway for traffic headed to the Domestic, GA and FBO Aprons.

Runway Change Operations

  • Runway changes must be coordinate with existing DEL, GND, TWR, DEP and APP controllers.
  • If possible, hold aircraft on stand before a runway change operation.
  • If an aircraft is already taxying on Twy F, offer the pilot the option to use the existing active Rwy or to enter the runway for taxiway direction change.
  • If an aircraft as already passed an approach IAF fix, an APP or TWR controller should advise the pilot of the possibility of a runway change prior to the aircraft being on the final approach segment.

Wake Separation

Arrivals (nm)

Lead J H M L
J
H 6 4
M 7 5 5
L 8 6 5 5

Departures (min)

Lead J H M L
J
H 2
M 3 2
L 3 2 2

VFR Operations

  • VFR Squawk Codes should be assigned through ES/TopSky.
Rwy Turn Altitude Remarks
18L Left Up to 1500 AGL -
36R Right Up to 1500 AGL -

DNMM Departure

  • DNMM doesn't have a dedicated Departure Position, with Lagos Approach (DNMM APP) assuming the role of Departure.

Departure Procedures

  • All aircraft are required to fly the assigned SID given by ATC. Controllers may issue continuous climb instructions to FL150. Further climb instructions may be issued to FL250 if no controller is above or other FL if coordinated prior.

Coordinating DNIB Departures

  • All departures departing out of DNIB shall be given runway heading with an initial climb of FL050.
  • Departures out of DNIB to the north should be sent to DNMM/ DNKK_CTR.

DNMM Murtala Muhammed Intl | v0.1 | DNKK Kano FIR

>> Go to this page.
>> Go to this page.

DNMM Approach

  • Be advised that DNMM does not have any single Approach Procedure for runways 36L/36R.

Arrivals Procedures

Rwy Fix Arrival Type Track Miles Approach Remarks
18R BUDSI BUSD1N RNAV 72 nm RNAV via MOLOP -
ERSED ERSE1N 101 nm RNAV via MOLOP -
GUMOM GUMO1N 93 nm RNAV via MOLOP -
EDGOT EDGO1N 98 nm RNAV via MOLOP -
ETVOV ETVO1N 100 nm RNAV via MOLOP -
ILKEL ILKE1N 72 nm RNAV via MOLOP -
TYE TYE1N 77 nm RNAV via MOLOP -
18L BUDSI BUDS1M 71 nm RNAV via EDKUV -
ERSED ERSE1M 97 nm RNAV via EDKUV -
GUMOM GUMO1M 90 nm RNAV via EDKUV -
EDGOT EDGO1M 95 nm RNAV via EDKUV -

Approach Procedures

  • Aircraft being positioned for final approach will be given a heading close to the localizer at a range of at least 8 NM from the runway threshold and at a level below the glide path.
  • The pilot will be told to complete the turn and to report established on ILS, but at this point if he requests, ATC will give another vector to bring the aircraft on to the localizer.
  • In order to maintain the correct spacing between aircraft, ATC may deliberately vector the aircraft through the localizer for approach from the other side. Pilots will be warned when this manoeuvre is being given.
Rwy Approach Frequency Course GP Angle IAF Platform Remarks
18R VOR DME ILS 108.10 ILB 181º 3.00º LAG 1710 ft -
RNAV (GNSS) - 181º 3.00º EBSEX or OVNIK, MOLOP 3000 ft 3500 ft at MOLOP
VOR DME 113.70 LAG 190º 3.00º 7 DME LAG 3000 ft -
18L VOR DME ILS 108.10 ILA 181º 3.00º LAG 2300 ft -
RNAV (GNSS) - 181º 3.00º OVNIK, EDKUV 2000 ft 3500 ft at OVNIK
VOR DME 113.70 LAG 181º 3.00º 7 DME LAG 2300 ft -

Holds

Name STAR Altitude Speed (IAS) Inbound CRS Turn Leg Time Remarks
LAG - 3500 ft + 230 KT 025º Left 1 min Runway 18R
LAG - 3500 ft + 230 KT 001º Left 1 min Runway 18L
EBSEX - FL050 + 230 KT 271º Left 1 min RNAV, Runway 18R
OVNIK - 3500 ft + 230 KT 056º Left 1 min RNAV, Runway 18L

Missed Approach Procedures

Rwy Approach Missed Approach Procedure Hold Remarks
18R VOR DME ILS Maintain Runway heading, passing 1000 ft, turn RIGHT climbing to 3500 ft and join VOR holding. LAG -
RNAV (GNSS) Maintain Runway heading, passing 1000 ft turn RIGHT climbing to FL050 to join holding at EBSEX. EBSEX -
VOR DME Maintain track 190º heading, passing 1000 ft, turn RIGHT climbing to 3500 ft and join VOR holding. LAG -
18L VOR DME ILS Maintain 181º heading, passing 1000 ft, turn RIGHT climbing to 3500 ft and join VOR holding. LAG -
RNAV (GNSS) Maintain Runway heading, passing 1000 ft, turn LEFT climbing to 3500 ft to join holding at OVNIK OVNIK -
VOR DME Maintain Runway heading, passing 1000 ft, turn RIGHT climbing to 3500 ft and join VOR holding. LAG -

MSA and MRVA

Radio Aid Min Distance Max Distance Radial From Radial To MSA Remarks
LAG 0 nm 25 nm 0º 0º 2500 ft -

Diversions

ICAO Name Distance Longest Rwy Remarks
DNIB Ibadan (Nigeria) 60 nm 2400 m -
DBBB Cardinal Bernardin Gantin Intl (Cotonou, Benin) 70 nm 2377 m -
DXXX Gnassingbe Eyadema Intl (Lome, Togo) 126 nm 2987 m -

DNMM Charts

Unfortunately, Nigeria does not provide publicly accessible navigational charts for its airspace or airports.

So, the most we can do at this point is to offer you a link to Google's Search Results.
